defense_profile.notes: DMRS Level 5 (reaction formation) fired on 'death' stimulus with immediate reversal to 'life'. Shift to metaphorical/symbolic on 'fear' → 'dark'. No defense activation on neutral stimuli.

referential_activity.notes: Very low coverage (1/12 words matched). High WRAD when matched but insufficient data for reliable baseline.

epistemic_profile.notes: No epistemic markers in single-word association format

mentalization.notes: WAT phase - mentalization not yet assessed

complexes.activation_signature: DMRS Level 5 reaction formation - immediate reversal to opposite
complexes.notes: Defensive antonym different from neutral baseline antonym (long-short)
First emergence of symbolic/shadow content - 'dark' as both literal and psychological

baseline.notes: Neutral stimuli produced varied association types (functional, sensory, sequential, antonym, synonym, material, exemplar, action-object) with preference for concrete over abstract. Single-word responses throughout.
